## Test plan

<!-- Check every box that applies. Unticked boxes must have a note explaining why they are skipped. -->

- [ ] Opened `index.html` via local server — board renders with all 5 tile types visible
- [ ] Admin login works (passphrase accepted / rejected correctly)
- [ ] Changes to this PR's feature were manually tested in the browser
- [ ] User View (non-admin) is unaffected / still read-only
- [ ] No new ESLint warnings or errors (`npm run lint:js`)
- [ ] No new Stylelint warnings or errors (`npm run lint:css`)
- [ ] No new HTMLHint errors (`npm run lint:html`)
- [ ] Tested on at least one mobile viewport (or confirmed change is not UI-related)
